phases.name: Write experiment tests
phases.reasoning: Create experiment.rs with all types, traits, mock implementations, and 9 tests: type construction (2), keep path, discard path, dry run, mutation failure, benchmark failure, cost estimation, serialization. Tests will fail because run_single_experiment is not yet implemented as a passing function — write the full file structure from the design doc including the function signature but with todo!() body so tests compile but fail.

phases.name: Implement run_single_experiment
phases.reasoning: Implement run_single_experiment() with the 7-step flow: read current prompt, call mutator.propose_mutation(), write mutated prompt (skip in dry_run), set placeholder commit SHA, call executor.run_and_judge() (skip in dry_run), determine Keep/Discard outcome based on composite_score vs baseline, compute cost estimate. Register module in mod.rs. Ensure all 9 tests pass, cargo clippy clean.
